options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <type1> # specify edge type1 for edge spacing (string, required) <type2> # specify edge type2 for edge spacing (string, required) <spacing> # specify edge spacing between type1 and type2

options.name: -exceptExactSpacing
options.description: an exception distance to the minimum spacing

options.name: -exceptNonFillerInBetween
options.description: edge spacing is only for adjacent instances

options.name: -forbiddenSpacing
options.description: forbid type1 and type2 w/ the space

options.name: -reset
options.description: reset the cell edge spacing to LEF
